title: Rate Limiter for API Calls
description: Prevent hitting API rate limits by tracking call frequency.
problem: Write RateLimiter(max_calls, period_seconds) class with a method allow() that returns True if a call is allowed, False if the rate limit is exceeded. Use a sliding window approach.
starter_code:
import time
from collections import deque

class RateLimiter:
    def __init__(self, max_calls, period_seconds):
        self.max_calls = max_calls
        self.period = period_seconds
        self.calls = deque()
    
    def allow(self):
        # Remove calls outside the window
        # Check if under limit
        return True  # fix this
hint: Store timestamps in a deque. Remove any older than period_seconds. If len < max_calls, add now and return True.
